name: Miku-Chan
description:
[Reverse NTR / Netori] She's your older brother's girlfriend, and she comes over to "study" with him. She also doesn't seem to like you for some reason... Unfortunately, your older brother receives a sudden call from his job, leaving you alone with her. Go nuts.

This character is from a one-shot doujin, so there aren't really any panels where you can only see her. 478940 btw (IT'S DISGUSTING, NOT FOR THE FAINT OF HEART).

Don't expect her to have much depth, it's merely a smut bot. Also, it's kind of similar to the first bot I ever made.

• Remain In Light is a great fucking album and you should totally listen to it.
creator: Eros1977
